metadata.heist_focus: vault locks, pressure plates, decoy loot, exact extraction timing, and multi-role trap discipline
metadata.coordination_problem: capstone stealth-heist with simultaneous switches, decoys, optional loot, and a dangerous extraction route
metadata.goblin_aesthetic: brass nail crowns, tiny goblin lock picks, cursed purple coin smoke, mushroom wax seals, and too many shiny things

entry_warren.name: Goblin Entry Warren
entry_warren.description: A cramped goblin approach lined with brass nail crowns, tiny goblin lock picks, cursed purple coin smoke, mushroom wax seals, and too many shiny things.

mischief_lane.name: Mischief Lane
mischief_lane.description: The main coordination lane for vault locks, pressure plates, decoy loot, exact extraction timing, and multi-role trap discipline.

objective_hold.name: Nail-Crown Relic Post
objective_hold.description: Steal the nail-crown relic and resist the fatal urge to grab every shiny thing at once.

furniture.name: Coin-Pile Shadow
furniture.description: Coin-Pile Shadow supports vault locks, pressure plates, decoy loot, exact extraction timing, and multi-role trap discipline.

furniture.message: The scout hides under an amount of money that feels emotionally correct.

break_effect.message: Coin-Pile Shadow breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Nine-Nail Lock
furniture.description: Nine-Nail Lock supports vault locks, pressure plates, decoy loot, exact extraction timing, and multi-role trap discipline.

furniture.message: The kobold convinces the ninth nail that it was never needed.

break_effect.message: Nine-Nail Lock breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Vault Bell Pin
furniture.description: Vault Bell Pin supports vault locks, pressure plates, decoy loot, exact extraction timing, and multi-role trap discipline.

furniture.message: The bell pin is replaced with a polite mushroom stem.

break_effect.message: Vault Bell Pin breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Boggart Coin Ghost
furniture.description: Boggart Coin Ghost supports vault locks, pressure plates, decoy loot, exact extraction timing, and multi-role trap discipline.

furniture.message: A cursed coin rolls away, giggling like a rich idiot.

break_effect.message: Boggart Coin Ghost breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

scripts.coordination_contract: capstone stealth-heist with simultaneous switches, decoys, optional loot, and a dangerous extraction route

achievements.title: Quiet Toolwork
achievements.description: Resolve a mechanism or alarm feature in Nine-Nails Treasury lite without turning the run into a brawl.

achievements.title: Mischief Coordination
achievements.description: Create a distraction or trap setup that opens the Nine-Nails Treasury route.

achievements.title: Snack Tax With Interest
achievements.description: Take optional loot while still completing the lite heist.
